soft_404_title_patterns: <title[^>]*>[^<]*(?:404|not found|page not found|does not exist|cannot be found|no such)[^<]*</title>
soft_404_body_phrases: the page you requested could not be found
the requested url was not found
the page you are looking for doesn't exist or has been moved
the page you are looking for does not exist or has been moved
